result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  NuGetDefense [command] [options]

Options:
  -p, --project, --project-file, --solution <project-file>                                                                              Project or Solution File to scan
  --framework, --target-framework-moniker, --tfm <target-framework-moniker>                                                             Framework to use when detecting versions for 'sdk style' projects
  --nugetdefense-json, --nugetdefense-settings, --settings-file <settings-file>                                                         Path to Settings File (ex. NuGetDefense.json)
  --do-not-break, --warn, --warn-only                                                                                                   Disables errors that would break a build, but outputs warnings for each report
  --check-dependencies, --check-transitive, --check-transitive-dependencies, --dependencies, --transitive                               Enables scanning of transitive dependencies
  --check-project-references, --check-referenced, --check-referenced-projects, --check-references, --referenced-projects, --references  Enables scanning projects referenced by the target project
  --ignore-packages <ignore-packages>                                                                                                   Adds names to a list of packages to ignore
  --ignore-cves, --ignore-vulns <ignore-cves>                                                                                           Adds listed vulnerabilities to a list that is ignored when reporting
  --cache-location <cache-location>                                                                                                     location used to retrieve the cache
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                                                        Show help and usage information
  --version                                                                                                                             Show version information

Commands:
  Update        Updates the Offline NVD Vulnerability source
  Recreate-NVD  Recreates the Offline NVD Vulnerability source

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  NuGetDefense [command] [options]

Options:
  -p, --project, --project-file, --solution <project-file>                                                                              Project or Solution File to scan
  --framework, --target-framework-moniker, --tfm <target-framework-moniker>                                                             Framework to use when detecting versions for 'sdk style' projects
  --nugetdefense-json, --nugetdefense-settings, --settings-file <settings-file>                                                         Path to Settings File (ex. NuGetDefense.json)
  --do-not-break, --warn, --warn-only                                                                                                   Disables errors that would break a build, but outputs warnings for each report
  --check-dependencies, --check-transitive, --check-transitive-dependencies, --dependencies, --transitive                               Enables scanning of transitive dependencies
  --check-project-references, --check-referenced, --check-referenced-projects, --check-references, --referenced-projects, --references  Enables scanning projects referenced by the target project
  --ignore-packages <ignore-packages>                                                                                                   Adds names to a list of packages to ignore
  --ignore-cves, --ignore-vulns <ignore-cves>                                                                                           Adds listed vulnerabilities to a list that is ignored when reporting
  --cache-location <cache-location>                                                                                                     location used to retrieve the cache
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                                                        Show help and usage information
  --version                                                                                                                             Show version information

Commands:
  Update        Updates the Offline NVD Vulnerability source
  Recreate-NVD  Recreates the Offline NVD Vulnerability source

result.stdout:
Description:
  Recreates the Offline NVD Vulnerability source

Usage:
  NuGetDefense Recreate-NVD [options]

Options:
  --nugetdefense-json, --nugetdefense-settings, --settings-file <settings-file>  Path to Settings File (ex. NuGetDefense.json)
  --api-key <api-key>                                                            NVD API key
  --vuln-data-file <vuln-data-file>                                              Path to use for the vuln data file
  -?, -h, --help                                                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Recreates the Offline NVD Vulnerability source

Usage:
  NuGetDefense Recreate-NVD [options]

Options:

  --api-key <api-key>                                                            NVD API key
  --vuln-data-file <vuln-data-file>                                              Path to use for the vuln data file
  -?, -h, --help                                                                 Show help and usage information
